message:
feat(spec): Apply 12 security and architecture improvements to FCP V2

Integrates comprehensive protocol review feedback addressing cryptographic
correctness, authority boundaries, operational scalability, and performance.

## Critical Security Fixes

### 1. Session Authentication: Fix Poly1305 Misuse (CRITICAL)
- Poly1305 is a one-time authenticator; using same key across frames is insecure
- Switch to HMAC-SHA256 or BLAKE3-keyed for session MACs
- Add SessionCryptoSuite enum for negotiation (Suite1: HMAC-SHA256, Suite2: BLAKE3)
- Add directional MAC keys (k_mac_i2r, k_mac_r2i) via HKDF-Expand
- Add SessionReplayPolicy with max_reorder_window and rekey_after_frames

### 4. Symbol AEAD Nonce Discipline (HIGH)
- 64-bit random nonces have birthday collision risk over long-running systems
- Add per-sender subkeys derived via HKDF from zone key
- Replace random nonce_base with deterministic frame_seq (monotonic per sender)
- Nonce = frame_seq_le || esi_le eliminates cross-sender collision risk
- Update FCPS frame format: Bytes 82-89 now Frame Seq (not Nonce Base)

### 6. Provable Capability Tokens (CRITICAL)
- Compromised issuance key could mint arbitrary tokens without constraint
- Add grant_object_ids: Vec<ObjectId> - tokens MUST reference CapabilityObjects
- Add aud_binary: Option<ObjectId> - bind tokens to connector binary (Risky/Dangerous)
- Verification now includes: fetch grants, verify chain, check revocation, validate subset
- Makes authority mechanically verifiable, not "trust the issuer"

## Zone Architecture Improvements

### 2. ZoneFrontier as Canonical GC Root
- Previous get_zone_root_set() was undefined
- ZoneFrontier is now the pinned GC root per zone
- Enables fast sync (compare frontiers), clean offline convergence
- Add section 3.8 with implementation requirements

### 3. Zone Port-Gating ACLs
- Lattice-based ACL contradicted confidentiality flow invariants
- Tailscale tags are per-node, not per-process; breaks lattice assumption
- New approach: zone membership port-gating (defense in depth)
- Add symbol_port and control_port to Zone struct
- Real security (integrity, confidentiality, taint) enforced cryptographically

## Authority and Key Management

### 5. ObjectIdKey Distribution + Ratchet Policy
- ObjectIdKey distribution was hand-wavy
- Now explicitly via ZoneKeyManifest with wrapped_object_id_keys
- Add ZoneRatchetPolicy for optional past secrecy (epoch key deletion)
- Add WrappedObjectIdKey struct for sealed distribution

## Operational Improvements

### 8. Admission Control and DoS Resistance
- Mesh layer is largest attack surface without admission control
- Add PeerBudget: max_bytes_per_min, max_symbols_per_min, max_failed_auth_per_min
- Add AdmissionPolicy with require_authenticated_requests
- Add anti-amplification rule: no bulk symbol response without auth + proof-of-need
- New section 8.4

### 9. Implementable Execution Leases
- Previous spec didn't explain distributed lease issuance
- Add coordinator field with HRW/Rendezvous hashing selection
- Add quorum_signatures for Risky/Dangerous operations
- Add LeaseRequest struct for acquisition protocol
- Add quorum rules: Safe (single), Risky (f+1), Dangerous (n-f)
- Add conflict resolution rules

### 10. OperationIntent Pre-commit
- Crash window between side-effect and receipt causes exactly-once failure
- Add OperationIntent struct (pre-commit log entry)
- MUST store intent BEFORE executing external side effect
- Receipt MUST reference intent via ObjectHeader.refs
- Intents + receipts form exactly-once spine

### 11. Connector State Snapshots + Fork Detection
- Append-only state chains grow forever (cold start, migration, GC drag)
- Add ConnectorStateSnapshot for periodic compaction
- Add compaction rule: snapshot every N updates or M bytes
- Add fork detection rule for singleton_writer (pause + alert)

## Performance and Observability

### 7. Chunked Objects
- RaptorQ forces all-or-nothing reconstruction (memory spikes for large objects)
- Add ChunkedObjectManifest and RawChunk structs
- Add max_chunk_threshold (256KB) and chunk_size (64KB) to RaptorQConfig
- Enables partial retrieval, targeted repair, version dedupe

### 12. TraceContext Propagation
- Add TraceContext struct (W3C compatible: trace_id, span_id, flags)
- Add trace_context to InvokeRequest and AuditEvent
- Enables end-to-end correlation across mesh, connectors, receipts, audit

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
